name: My Tuna Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles as directed on the package.
2. Drain the water from the noodle pot.
3. Cool the noodles by washing them with cold water and then draining all the water.
4. Mix 3 heaping tablespoons of Mayonaise with the noodles.
5. Combine the noodles and Mayonnaise mixture with 1 can of tuna.
6. Add 9 drops of hot sauce to the mixture.
7. Toss in the remaining ingredients.
